title: DR.VIVA Smart Watches for Men, Fitness Tracker with Heart Rate Monitor, 1.3" Full Touch Screen Sleep Monitor 18 Sport Modes 7-Day Battery Life 5ATM Waterproof Watches for iPhone/Android Phones
features: 【Heart Rate Monitor & Sleep Monitor】Built-in PPG heart rate sensor coupled with HR algorithm, the smart watch can accurately monitor your heart rate during wearing. Automatic sleep tracking can monitor your sleep status (deep sleep, shallow sleep, awakening) and provide a comprehensive sleep quality analysis. All health tracking metrics can help you get a better understanding of your health and make reasonable adjustments to your lifestyle.

【Accurate Fitness Tracker & 18 Sport Modes】The activity tracker accurately record all-day activities like steps, distance, calories burned, miles walked, active minutes. The fitness tracker supports 18 sports modes: running, walking, climbing, cycling, basketball, football, tennis, aerobics, yoga, rope jumping, sit-ups, swimming, etc. Can give you more detailed insights into your whole day's activities and improve your athletic performance. Stay motivated all day!

【Long Battery Life & 5ATM Waterproof】The fitness tracker for men is equipped with a 170mAh Li-Polymer battery, only takes 2 hours to get fully charged by a magnetic charging cable to support 7 days of normal use. The fitness watch is 5ATM waterproof, you can wear it when washing hands, in the rain, or swimming in the shallow water, which allows you to swim in the pool with it without worries. (Note: Do Not support hot water shower, diving, surfing, saunas, spring, etc).

【1.3" Full Touch Screen & Custom Watch Face】Our smart watch with 1.3 inch IPS LCD color touch screen display, brings a resolution of 240x240. You can also customize the watch face in the "Zeroner" App to show your personality. DIY for your preferences and mood.

【Smart Notifications & More Practical Tools】The smartwatch is wide compatibility with iOS & Android. You can receive incoming calls or read SMS and SNS notifications on your smartwatch. (It CAN'T answer/reply to messages, calls, or text back.) (Including SMS, Facebook, Whatsapp, Twitter, Instagram, etc.). You will never miss important news. The smartwatches also feature remote control of music and camera, sedentary reminder, alarm clock, stopwatch, timer, a compass to meet your daily needs.

reviews.title: Keep track
reviews.text: This fitness tracker is simple to setup and in no time it'll be keeping track of your health so you have a monitor of what you do every day. It's simple to track and manage your sleep patterns or steps you take in a day. Very simple to use mobile app. The watch lasts a long time before dieing at least 2 days

reviews.title: Super impressed with this watch. Truly remarkable
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:ae47b9651b52b2c1b0485219f33680bf]] Wow. I am not impressed by much, but this watch is truly impressive for this price point.

Build: Very good build quality. The waterproof case feels solid, with responsive buttons and full color high res screen. Bracelet is soft rubber and is very comfortable. It's a very large band, so large or small wrists will fit in here.

Features: Though not perfect, the features on this watch are impressive. Measures steps, activities, heart rate, laps, sleep quality. Very very nice featuers. Plus it's waterproof!!!

Cons: Some of the interfaces are a bit clunky, and the app could use work, but it's fairly intuitive, and easy to use. I connected to my Galaxy S7 with no problems.

I recommend this watch!

reviews.title: My favorite budget smart watch
reviews.text:
I've tried a variety of budget smart watches, and this one by Dr.Viva has become my favorite. It's very comfortable, great flexible band, no issues with feeling like it's pressing into my wrist bones. The screen display is a good size without being too large, perfect for smaller wrists.

The Zeroner app has been fantastic, no problems. It accurately tracks my steps, sleep & oxygen. I like how it has a variety of exercises for me to document. The battery life is a big winner. I recharge the smart watch once a week, compared to twice a week with the other watches I've tried before. I was disappointed that I don't have the option to have my own picture as the screen display, but the app still has plenty of screens to choose from.

If you're like me and don't want to spend an exorbitant price on a smart watch, but would still like to enjoy the features of a smart watch this one would be a great option.

reviews.title: Inaccurate
reviews.text: This is a cute watch. Set up was simple. I liked the pink band and it was comfortable. The multi-lingual instructions are useless. Even worse it is inaccurate. I was at my desk and took it off. When I came back it said I logged 1800 steps.  It was sitting in the same place on the desk. Not. Back to my fit bit.

reviews.title: Very Durable and Love the Face
reviews.text:
The watch and band are more durable than I expected at this price point. The watch is very easy to install and should not take more than 5 minutes. For some reason I really like the aesthetics on the face of the watch.

I have another watch that is comparable and this watch costs 25% less. This is definitely good value. A watch like this is a game changer for people monitoring heart issues. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Very limited life span
reviews.text: Too costly for what is now a disposable watch.  Within about 3 months the watch started randomly sending two vibrating signals like it was trying to make a notification of some sort.  Second vibration came with a short screen request to shut down the watch.  Side button quit working after about a month but was not an issue.  Still kept accurate time, fairly good step counts, and notifications of incoming texts and phone calls.  Just can’t stand the frequent and random vibrating. Unlike other commenters my watches battery life was very good.

reviews.title: It stopped for no reason twice
reviews.text: I am returning the first one that I got because I think perhaps there may be a flaw in it because for no reason at all it just shut itself off or wouldn't show me any information on the watch and it did that to me twice so when it happened again today the second time I decided I'm returning it and requesting a replacement if it happens with the replacement then I'm getting my refund. I don't like sleeping with it on it's uncomfortable not used to sleeping with any kind of jewelry I did use it a few days and checked my sleep and it seemed to give me the same answer every time so I don't know if that's very accurate either? I realize these gadgets are not accurate however I'm just trying to find a way to motivate myself to move around more and I refuse to pay over $100 for one of these smart watches so I got this one on a lightning deal.

reviews.title: not as advertised
reviews.text:
the watch face does not come on when you raise your arm or turn or flick your wrist. this is a major problem if you assistive devices for walking.
the advertised picture is not available as a watchface when setting up the watch.
this watch is very heavy.
the band is inflexible plastic, not silicone-like at all.

this product is going back.

reviews.title: Not impressed--clock always switches to between modes--walking mode never stayed on not reliable
reviews.text: i made a mistake choosing this product switching between screens never tracked sleep,walking,sports and exercise time

reviews.title: Easy to sync, love this watch
reviews.text: I just received this watch today. So easy to set up. My Samsung S2 would not keep a charge despite everything I did. So I started searching for a new smart watch. I read many, many reviews on this watch. The price was phenomenal  so I thought I would try it! So far its just what I wanted. Easy, stylish. I bought the black one, but switched out bands to a turquoise one. So happy with it!

reviews.title: Excellent value for price
reviews.text: I would describe this watch as something for health purposes rather that physical training. I really like the heart rate, blood pressure, and sleep tracker. Pedometer is also pretty accurate. I wish there were more color schemes. Overall it’s a great dupe for an iWatch or Samsung watch for 1/10th of a price.

title: Garmin Instinct 2, dezl Edition, Rugged Trucking Smartwatch, Easy Break Planning, Compatible with the dezl OTR Navigator, Black
description: Instinct® 2 - dēzl™ Edition is the first rugged smartwatch designed specifically for professional truck drivers who want trackable health metrics, short-break workouts and many truck plaza conveniences for over-the-road lifestyles. Enjoy all-day health monitoring features that track your heart rate, sleep, Pulse Ox, respiration and more (Pulse Ox not available in all countries. This device is intended to give an estimation of your activity and metrics; it is not a medical device). Pair this watch with the dēzl™ app on your compatible smartphone for workout tutorials that fit within standard break times. When using the dēzl app, take advantage of truck plaza loyalty programs with Love’s Travel Stops and Pilot Flying J Travel Centers, and Garmin Pay™ contactless payments help you breeze through checkout lines with a supported country and payment network. Save time and improve efficiency with PrePass® U.S. weigh station and bypass notifications viewed right on your watch, using your active PrePass account and the dēzl app on your compatible smartphone.
features: Rugged trucking smartwatch is water-rated to 100 meters and thermal- and shock-resistant with scratch-resistant glass display with silicone band for all-day comfort
Extra-long battery life: up to 28 days in smartwatch mode; up to 30 hours in GPS mode
Easy break planning with timely notifications and Garmin Pay contactless payments, which help you breeze through checkout lines with a supported country and payment network.
Pair with the dēzl app for access to loyalty programs from some of the nation’s leading travel plazas, including Love’s Travel Stops and Pilot Flying J Travel Centers
Save time and improve efficiency with PrePass notifications of upcoming U.S. weigh stations and bypass decisions; requires active PrePass account and use of the dēzl app on your compatible smartphone

All-day health monitoring features that track your heart rate, sleep, Pulse Ox, respiration and more (Pulse Ox not available in all countries. This device is intended to give an estimation of your activity and metrics; it is not a medical device).; pair with the dēzl app on your compatible smartphone for access to workout tutorials that fit within standard break times
Works with the Connect IQ Store app on your compatible smartphone to personalize your watch with free watch faces, apps and more

reviews.title: Would be the perfect watch if the battery was replaceable
reviews.text:
I normally don't like smart watches because I hate the idea of spending hundreds of dollars on something with a non-replaceable battery that will wear out in a few years rendering the watch useless. Even though I do love my new Instinct 2 watch, I'm still not crazy about the wasteful business model of smart watches, and am not sure I will buy another after this one. That said, the Instinct 2 is a near perfect watch in almost every way... it is feature packed, fully customizable (without being over the top), has a long battery life, and is very comfortable as a daily driver watch.

I use mine for the usual day-to-day watch stuff, and hiking primarily. I don't use any of the smart phone or health features (heart rate, pulse ox, etc.) as I don't care about them. I use the compass, altimeter, and gps tracking features frequently, and they all work great.

Overall, this is a fantastic watch for what it is. However, I really, REALLY hate that it has a non-replaceable battery that will inevitably wear out after only a few years. I know that this is the case as I had a Fenix 5 before this one that lasted about 4 years before the battery began dying quickly. It essentially became a $500 door stop after that...

reviews.title: Smart sports watch with extreme battery life.
reviews.text: In my opinion, this is the perfect smart sports watch. Great battery life, but all the sport features you need. Sure its not color or touch screen, but the utility is as good as it gets.

reviews.title: Great GPS Watch!
reviews.text: So far, so good! I’ve only had this watch for two days, but I’m convinced I made the right choice. I like the color and I have already made a watch face on garmin.facebuilder. It’s new to me but I watched many YouTube videos about this watch, so I knew I’d be able to pick it up quickly. I haven’t been out in the sun enough to appraise the solar capabilities, but I’m quite sure it will be less than they advertised. I’m happy with it just the same! I recommend this watch.

reviews.title: Easy set up and can text and phone calls
reviews.text: I like the looks and it tells me to get off my ass and move.

reviews.title: Decently priced
reviews.text: Chose this watch because of the simplicity and overall look.  The step counts and sleep features work very well.  Battery life is approximately 2 days use when using the push button feature.  If you enable the sensor to come on with your wrist approximately 1 day use.  Charge works very well and quickly.  The downfall is definitely the rubber banding.  The piece that holds the excess band tends to move.  Call feature is ok for the price and messaging is ok.  I primarily needed for an alarm, clock and date.

reviews.title: great smartwatch
reviews.text: I bought this for my uncle for his birthday. He wanted a smart watch to monitor his health. He liked it and it was easy for him to set up.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: I had an Apple Watch before this. This is really no different than the Apple Watch,  everything that worked on there works fine here! Did find a screen protector  it is (Smaat 1.7”) it fits perfect! And touch screen still works fine. as far as I can tell there are no other bands made for this type of connection, which is kind of ridiculous. So if the band breaks, you literally have to buy a new watch don’t like that! Also, wish it could at least have the temperature on the screen! And there are only certain screens that have the power level or day and date, and you cannot pick a screen from your photos, etc. and add the date. Just trying to inform people of all of the things that I was looking for in reviews and no one ever mentioned any of these hopefully it helps!

reviews.title: Nice watch!
reviews.text: I bought this watch to track my fitness mainly.  I'm not the type of person who's into gadgets per se but I think this is a winner.  It's not expensive but still stylish and functional.

title: Vowor 4G Smartwatch for Kids with Sim Card, Waterproof Phone Watch with WiFi LBS GPS Tracker Video Chat SOS Camera Alarm Clock Anti Lost Watches Children Boys Girls Birthday Gift Age 3-15 (Black)
description:
Vowor Smart watches 4G for Kids
Kids smartwatch supports 4G/3G/2G Nano sim card with data and voice plans.
GSM Bands:
US: B2/B5
3G Bands (WCDMA):
US: B2/B5
4G Band(FDD TDD):
US:B2/4/5/7/12/17
Note:
1. you need to have voice and data plan to make the kids phone watch works properly 2. The Vowor 4G kids phone watch is NOT compatible with Verizon or Sprint, we recommend T-Mobile, Speedtalk and AT&T. But it is ok if your own's phone (parent's) card is Verizon or Sprint. The Vowor kids smartwatch doesn't support other APP except Leefine.
Q&A:
1. Why the watch doesn’t have the network(The watch shows "Search ... " for a long time)
(1) The SIM card is not overdue. (2) Check the upper left corner of the watch interface for stable signal icons or up and down arrows. If no, please restart the watch. (3) There may be no set the correct APN.
2. Why the watch cannot recognize the SIM card
(1) Confirm that the SIM card is not overdue. (2) Confirm that the SIM card is installed in the right direction. (3) Power off before card insertion. (4) Change the region and try again.
3. Why can't I make a video call
(1) Confirm that the SIM card has data and the network signal is stable. (2) Check whether the APP side is disabled for video calls. (3) Other family members who want video calls need to have a Leefine account and bind the watch. (4) Whether all permissions of APP needed are granted. (5) The APP needs to be opened, run and work in the background. Only the video call is initiated on the watch end, the APP end can receive the push message. (6) The video call has just ended. It will take 5 minutes for the watch end to call again.
Package Included:
1 x Kids smartwatch 1 x USB cable 1x User manual 1x Watch screen protector 1x sim card
features: 【Vowor 4G Kids Smart watch】: the smartwatch kids 4G has all functions you need: Face-talk (video calling), wifi LBS GPS Tracker, geofencing, Pedometer, Voice chat, Texts, Anti-lost, Class Mode, HD Camera, Historical tracker, Safe zones, Remote monitoring, SOS, alarm clock, low battery notification etc. It is a great gift for your kid 3-15 years old.

【Two-way Calling】: the Vowor 4G kids phone watch supports video calling and voice calling, you can chat with your kids face to face, but also can make a voice call. Make sure your sim card have the plan with Voice & Data: voice plan is for calling, and data plan is for network.

【4G WIFI LBS GPS Tracker】: Double position technology based on AGPS, Location Base on Cell Tower Station means double safety for kids. GPS is suitable for outdoor(especially in open areas),with a little inaccurate; WIFI is suitable for indoor, the accuracy depends on the carrier's backend database; LBS depends on the density of the communication base station and where you are, the inaccurate is relatively large. The watch choose GPS first, then WIFI, and finally the LBS. At the same time, parent

【Safety Protection】: 4G smartwatch for Kids equipped with an LBS/GPS/WIFI system that accurate location, you can check the real-time location of your kids and history activity footprint. You can also set the child's range of activity, if the child leaves the set area, the geofencing feature will alerts you. Accurate activity tracker, built-in speed sensor.

【1-year Warranty】: The kids smartwatch is made of high quality material, anti-fall and durable. The band strap is made of soft Silicone, it is very comfortable to wear it and it does not scratch the hand. We will provide 1-year warranty, replacements such as band strap or data cords will be send out for free. If you have any problems about our smart watches, Please feel free to contact us first. We will reply you within 24 hours.

The colors as presented in listing are accurate and, in fact, I liked the teal and purple even more when I saw them in person.  There's only one noticeable difference between these bands and the original band.  The original band is quite smooth while these bands have some friction to them when you run you fingers over them.  Neither texture is better than the other. They're just different. My original band is black and absent the difference in feel, there's no real distinction vs. the black band that I received in this six pack.

title: Fintie Band Compatible with Fitbit Versa 2 / Versa/Versa Lite, Premium Resin Replacement Wristband Strap Bracelet Compatible with Fitbit Versa Smart Watch, Pink-tone
description:
Fintie, a quality product within your reach!
Tech Specs:
1. Material: High quality Resin with metal buckle2.Color: Pink-tone, Tortoise-tone, Purple. Various colors available to dress up your Fitbit Versa and match any suit in your wardrobe
Compatible with
Versa 2, Versa 2 Special Edition, Versa Special Edition, Versa and Versa Lite Edition watches.
What's in the Box:
1 x Sport Loop Band for Fitbit Versa; 3 x Quick Release Spring Pins (the Fitness Tracker is NOT included)
features: Buckle closure
Perfect accessory band Compatible with Versa 2, Versa 2 Special Edition, Versa Special Edition, Versa and Versa Lite Edition watches. (The Fitbit device is not included.)

Combined with premium Resin and stainless steel metal buckle, this strap stands as a symbol of luxury, nobility, elegance and durability, feels like plastic lightweight design, but more durable and comfortable than plastic.
Adjustable Length: The size can be adjusted according to the circumstance of individual wrist, fits 6.65"-8.15" (169mm-207mm) wrist.
Durable Buckle: Refined double button folding clasp design, firmly closed, and prevent loosen automatically, safe and beautiful.

Quick Release Design: Easy to replace or exchange the strap band without tools within seconds. Package Contents: 1 x Smart Watch Band, 3 x Quick Release Spring Bars, 1 x Link Removal Tool and 1 x User manual. (Note: watch is Not included.)

reviews.title: These where exactly what I needed
reviews.text: Great band. I ended up getting two different colors. Easy to switch out and extremely cute.

title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 4 Classic 42mm Smartwatch with ECG Monitor Tracker for Health Fitness Running Sleep Cycles GPS Fall Detection Bluetooth US Version, Black (Renewed)
description: This pre-owned or refurbished product has been professionally inspected and tested to work and look like new. How a product becomes part of Amazon Renewed, your destination for pre-owned, refurbished products: A customer buys a new product and returns it or trades it in for a newer or different model. That product is inspected and tested to work and look like new by Amazon-qualified suppliers. Then, the product is sold as an Amazon Renewed product on Amazon. If not satisfied with the purchase, renewed products are eligible for replacement or refund under the Amazon Renewed Guarantee.
features: 1.2 "(30.5mm) w/ Rotating Bezel, Super AMOLED, 396 x 396 pixels (~330 ppi density), 16M Colors, CPU: Dual-Core 1.15GHz, 247mAh Battery, Android Wear OS, One UI Watch 3, Bluetooth, Wi-Fi
The Galaxy Watch4 Classic uses red LEDs and infrared rays to calculate your SpO2 levels or the amount of oxygen in your blood.
Glass front (Gorilla Glass DX+), MIL-STD-810G compliant, 50m water-resistant (IP68), Compatible with standard 20mm straps, ECG certified, Blood pressure monitor
5 ATM / IP68 The water and dust resistance rating, Military-grade durability, Larger screen but lighter and thinner for more comfort.
Compatible with Android Phones Running Android 6.0 and Above. NOT compatible with iOS.

reviews.title: Just the works.
reviews.text: It didn't have any manual or anything written enclosed to help a novice like me get it charged up and working.  I'm waiting for my son to arrive for setup help.  It looks like new with no scratches, no blemishes or other indications of wear.

reviews.title: Great Watch
reviews.text: I bought this watch I’m a refurbished deal during Amazon days. I never thought I would find myself wearing this type of watch, but I absolutely find myself loving it. I took this deal hesitantly but find that I can’t tell the difference between this and a new watch. The watch arrived absolutely flawless and looked like a brand new watch. I really see no difference between It and Products that I have received new. I reviewed other watches and other types of watches before purchasing the watch 4, But I am truly glad that I made the purchase that I did. I’m also very satisfied with the refurbish condition I got from Amazon.

reviews.title: Returned bad battery life
reviews.text:
Never really got to use the watch. Battery in normal mode only lasted about 10 hours. In battery saver mode the battery level dropped 10% in 7 hours with the watch turned off and sitting on a dresser not being worn.
Not worth the cost in my eyes.

reviews.title: this is the worst watch I have ever had
reviews.text:
First off, this watch will not last more then 4 hours.
had it on the charger for about 4 days, and still goes empty in about 4 hours

title: UHKZ 4 Pack Elastic Nylon Bands Compatible with Fitbit Versa 3/Fitbit Sense,Stretchy Fabric Sport Band for Fitbit Versa Smart Watch for Women Men,Black/Rose Pink/White/Smokey Mauve
features: ❤【Compatibility】 This Adjustable Nylon Bands Only Compatible with Fitbit Versa 3/Fitbit Sense.

❤【Premium Nylon Material】The watch band is made of premium stretch nylon: It is soft, durable, lightweight, washable and comfortable to wear. Stretch bracelet wrist bands and fits snugly without constriction. Close to your wrist, it won't irritate your skin, perfect for all day-workouts and regular wear.

❤【Flexible Design】Elastic band and adjustable stainless steel buckle design. The stretchy nylon materials make the strap easy to put on and off. Stylish loop buckle make it could be length adjustable as you wish. The band suitable for wrist size 4.5"-9.5".
❤【Easy to Install】The sport band With quick release spring bars, which locks onto the watch Interface precisely and securely, no tool needed.
❤【Unique Design】Multiple colors and sizes for your choice. You can find lovely color for different occasion. The nylon bands have unique wave pattern, more fashion and catch sights.

reviews.title: Comfortable, worth the value
reviews.text: The band that originally came with the Fitbit was so uncomfortable. It dig into my wrist and left marks. I ordered another band that was about the same price as all four of these. It was useless. Barely fit, and it wouldn’t keep its position, so I decided to try these. First, I couldn’t believe that the same price got me FOUR bands in different colors! The bands are easily adjustable. Once fitted, these stay in place on the wrist. They’re comfy, and they stretch enough so that I can pull off the Fitbit to charge without having to readjust the band. Though inexpensive, this particular purchase was one of the best I’ve had this year, LOL.

reviews.title: Really love them but 2 already broke after 2 weeks
reviews.text: I really love these, I hate the bands that come with the fitbits. These are really comfortable but 1 band wouldn't work for some reason then another band broke after 2 weeks without even consistently wearing it.

reviews.title: Did NOT Work with Sense 2
reviews.text: Not sure what the issue is, but I could not get any of these bands to engage and lock with the Sense 2.  The tab fits into the slot just fine, but it won't engage the locking tab to hold the band into place.  Pulling on the band at all causes it to simply fall out of the watch case.  The bands themselves look fine, but not locking into place obviously makes them worthless for their intended purpose.

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: These performed ok.  It's a good elastic band

reviews.title: Very comfortable
reviews.text: Fits well and allows my arm to breath. I got a rash from the plastic ones

title: Beantech Gold Engage Plus Smartwatch for iOS and Android with 8GB of Music Storage and Leather Strap
description: Beantech Engage Plus smart Watch provides full function applications in a classically elegant design. Stay healthy by using a full array of fitness apps, then back up your data on Beantech Watch app. Send and receive phone calls, texts and emails on the Watch. Load and store over 1000 songs in the music Vault. Beantech Engage Plus works with both iPhone and Android phones. Bit Watch app available on Apple app store and Google play store at No additional cost. Polished Silver with Brown Calfskin Leather strap.
features: FUNCTION - full function smart watch in a Classic design. Ips touch screen for bright clear viewing and interfacing with pre-loaded apps. Works with iPhone or Android.
COMMUNICATIONS - send and receive phone calls, texts and email. Receives notifications from phone apps.
FITNESS- count daily steps, check your heart rate, monitor your sleep patterns and upload to Bit watch app to keep track. Compare to daily goals.
MUSIC VAULT - 8G of on board storage allows you to load and store over 1000 songs on the watch, then take them with you without your phone!
BIT WATCH APP - interfaces with Bit watch app to allow communications, sync time and store fitness data. Bit watch app is available in Apple app store and Google play store at no additional cost.
COMPATIBILITY - iPhone - iOS 7.1 or higher and model 5S or newer. Android phones - Android 4.4 or higher.

reviews.text: The price was good. The watch is attractive but will not charge. Neither would the replacement watch charge.

reviews.title: Don't waste money
reviews.text: Got this as a gift. They will send it back. The app sucks doesn't work well. Check the reviews for it too! The watch doesn't take accurate heart rate, really big but I don't mind if it actually worked good. Not worth the money or headache
